# 第二部分：数据清洗

本章节介绍数据清洗流程，包括缺失值处理、异常值检测等。

## Parquet格式存储与性能对比

```{python}
import pyarrow.parquet as pq
import time

# 保存为Parquet
df.to_parquet("data/clean/stock_clean.parquet", index=False)

# 列式读取（只加载需要的列）
df = pd.read_parquet("data/clean/stock_clean.parquet",
                     columns=["date", "code", "close"])

# 查看Schema
schema = pq.read_schema("data/clean/stock_clean.parquet")
print(schema)

# 与CSV对比：读取速度与文件体积
t0 = time.time()
pd.read_csv("data/clean/stock_clean.csv")
csv_time = time.time() - t0
csv_size = os.path.getsize("data/clean/stock_clean.csv")

t0 = time.time()
pd.read_parquet("data/clean/stock_clean.parquet")
pq_time = time.time() - t0
pq_size = os.path.getsize("data/clean/stock_clean.parquet")

print(f"CSV  读取耗时: {csv_time:.3f}s  文件大小: {csv_size/1024:.1f} KB")
print(f"Parquet 读取耗时: {pq_time:.3f}s  文件大小: {pq_size/1024:.1f} KB")
```
